0.text: Multiple calcified nodules in both lung parenchyma

1.text: Calcified nodules predominantly in the upper lobes

2.text: Mild bronchial ectasia in the apex of the upper lobes

3.text: Bronchial wall thickening in the apex of the upper lobes

4.text: Increased reticulonodular densities in the apex of the upper lobes

5.text: Increased ground-glass densities in the apex of the upper lobes

6.text: Mosaic attenuation differences in the upper lobes
